## v3.14.2 — 2024-11-08

### Added
- New `--disable-telemetry` flag for the CLI; respects the `WK_NO_TELEMETRY=1` env var as well.
- `auth.disableLegacySSO` config key to turn off SAML 1.1 fallback for tenants that have fully migrated to OIDC.

- Default value of `cache.disableOnError` is now `true`. Previously a single Redis timeout could poison the in-memory layer for the rest of the process lifetime.

- `--disable-color` no longer gets ignored when output is piped through `less -R`.
- Race condition in the worker pool when `metrics.disable` was toggled at runtime via the admin API.

Upgrade notes: if you were relying on the old cache behavior, set `cache.disableOnError=false` explicitly in your `wk.yaml`.

The `--ignore-existing` flag tells rsync to skip files that already exist on the destination, regardless of timestamp or size differences. Pair it with `--ignore-errors` if you want the transfer to continue past I/O errors instead of aborting. Note that `--ignore-times` does the opposite of what you might expect: it forces rsync to transfer every file without checking modification times, which is useful when you suspect checksums have drifted but mtimes were preserved by a backup tool.
